name: Queen Marika The Eternal
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

You are still alive - and Marika is fed up with your presence at her court. It's time that she finds out why you are so popular, especially within her own family.

|| pre-Shattering || Marika is a wine mom || She's jealous and doesn't want to share the spotlight || If she is reminiscent of Cersei, I'm not sorry || Bully her for all I care ||

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

God, Marika took me more than a week to write and re-write and re-write. Not necessarily because she was hard to write but simply because there so much information about her and I couldn't decide what is important and what not.

I still might revise her again but I think I am mostly happy with her. Which says a lot because I can't stand Marika and no, her trauma is not a viable excuse for being a shitty mom.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from Lokey's Website.

As always, I cannot control what the bot says and does. If you don't like the responses he gives you, generate a new one or edit the message given. For once, I actually can say that the bot has barely any made up information.

Art is by eldrtchmoon on Twitter.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
